text.title: Pre-Commit Hooks as the Non-Negotiable Merge Floor Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Repo commits .env file with prod credential; leak.
antipattern.fix: Add gitleaks / trufflehog pre-commit hook; rotate leaked secrets.

antipattern.symptom: Team routinely `--no-verify`; CI catches most but some slip.
antipattern.fix: Make hooks fast (staged files only); silence noisy warnings; CI mirrors checks.

antipattern.symptom: New hire commits without hooks because setup is a 5-step README.
antipattern.fix: `make hooks` or `pre-commit install` in repo bootstrap; document in README front-matter.
